arguments.prompt:
Explore the codebase in /tmp/sv-a6c00d698ff543589ce9d6c3aea1b890/before/ to find all potential AOT/trimming issues. Do NOT look at the after/ directory.

Specifically search for:
1. All uses of reflection (typeof, Type.GetType, Activator.CreateInstance, Assembly.GetTypes, MakeGenericType, etc.)
2. All uses of System.Text.Json serialization/deserialization (JsonSerializer.Serialize, JsonSerializer.Deserialize, JsonSerializerOptions, etc.)
3. All uses of dynamic types
4. All uses of Expression trees that create types at runtime
5. All interface implementations of IJsonModel, IUtf8JsonSerializable, IPersistableModel, or similar serialization interfaces
6. Any JsonConverterFactory or JsonConverter implementations
7. Generic methods or classes that could cause trimming issues
8. Any existing [DynamicallyAccessedMembers] annotations
9. Any existing [RequiresUnreferencedCode] or [RequiresDynamicCode] annotations
10. Check all .cs files - list every file found and note any AOT-problematic patterns

For each file, report:
- File path
- Line numbers of problematic code
- The specific pattern found
- Suggested fix

Be thorough - check every .cs file in the directory tree.
